Element token: BROADCAST_MIC

Describe the element in the image below.

response.content: {"description": "A large-diaphragm condenser studio microphone with a cylindrical champagne/satin-nickel metal body. The upper capsule section features a fine woven mesh grille in a darker silver-gray tone. The body bears engraved text reading 'PHANTOM classic' and a circular logo emblem, with 'Nr. 1307' engraved near the base. The microphone is mounted in a silver spider shock mount with elastic suspension bands. A circular black pop filter with dual-layer mesh is attached via a flexible gooseneck arm to the left side of the stand.", "consistencyTag": "champagne-condenser-studio-mic"}
